system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_sanpham_intem","body":"CREATE   PROC [dbo].[TR_SANPHAM_INTEM]
(
	@masp nvarchar(300)
)
AS
BEGIN
--DECLARE @masp nvarchar(300) =  N'2307TA0103_TỰ NHIÊN_RID'
Declare @table_carton table
(
	masp nvarchar(300),
	dai float,
	rong float,
	cao float

)
Declare @table_carton_resul table
(
	masp nvarchar(300),
	quycach1 nvarchar(300),
	soluong_carton int
)

insert into @table_carton(masp,dai,rong,cao)
select masp,
LTRIM(RTRIM(LEFT(REPLACE(quycach2,'D',''), CHARINDEX('*', REPLACE(quycach2,'D','')) - 1))) AS dai2,
LTRIM(RTRIM(SUBSTRING(REPLACE(quycach2,'R',''), CHARINDEX('*', REPLACE(quycach2,'R','')) + 1, CHARINDEX('*', REPLACE(quycach2,'R',''), CHARINDEX('*', REPLACE(quycach2,'R','')) + 1) - CHARINDEX('*', REPLACE(quycach2,'R','')) - 1))) AS rong2,
LTRIM(RTRIM(RIGHT(REPLACE(quycach2,'C',''), CHARINDEX('*', REVERSE(REPLACE(quycach2,'C',''))) - 1))) as cao2
from tr_sanpham_carton 
where masp = @masp

insert into @table_carton_resul(masp)
values(@masp)

DECLARE @_masp nvarchar(300)
DECLARE @_dai float
DECLARE @_rong float
DECLARE @_cao float
DECLARE @Count INT
SET @Count = 0

DECLARE cursorProduct CURSOR FOR  
SELECT masp,dai,rong,cao FROM @table_carton
OPEN cursorProduct    
FETCH NEXT FROM cursorProduct     
      INTO @_masp, @_dai,@_rong,@_cao
WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0  
BEGIN
   DECLARE @quycach nvarchar(max)
   SET @Count = @Count + 1

   select @quycach = ISNULL(quycach1,'') + '-BOX '+ CAST(@Count as nvarchar(10))+':'+CHAR(13)+'       '+
		CONCAT(ISNULL(Cast(@_dai as float),0),'*',ISNULL(Cast(@_rong as float),0),'*',ISNULL(Cast(@_cao as float),0),' mm') + char(13) +'       '+
		CONCAT(CONCAT(ROUND((ISNULL(Cast(@_dai as float),0)/25.4),1),'*',ROUND((ISNULL(Cast(@_rong as float),0)/25.4),1),'*',ROUND((ISNULL(Cast(@_cao as float),0)/25.4),1)),' inch') 
   from @table_carton_resul
    where masp = @_masp

   UPDATE @table_carton_resul
   SET quycach1 = @quycach
   where masp = @_masp

    FETCH NEXT FROM cursorProduct 
          INTO @_masp, @_dai,@_rong,@_cao
END

CLOSE cursorProduct              
DEALLOCATE cursorProduct  

   UPDATE @table_carton_resul
   SET soluong_carton = @Count
   where masp = @masp

select a.hehang,a.tensp,
'       ' + CONCAT(a.quycach,' mm') + char(13) + '       ' + 
CONCAT(CONCAT(ROUND((ISNULL(a.dai,0)/25.4),1),'*',ROUND((ISNULL(a.rong,0)/25.4),1),'*',ROUND((ISNULL(a.cao,0)/25.4),1)),' inch') as quycach_sp,
a.n_weight,a.g_weight,
ISNULL(b.tenloaisp_English,b.tenloaisp) as tenloaisp,

--Concat('-BOX 1:' + CHAR(13)+'       ' +CONCAT(ISNULL(Cast(a.dai_carton as float),0),'*',ISNULL(Cast(a.rong_carton as float),0),'*',ISNULL(Cast(a.cao_carton as float),0),' mm') + char(13) +'       '+
--CONCAT(CONCAT(ROUND((ISNULL(Cast(a.dai_carton as float),0)/25.4),1),'*',ROUND((ISNULL(Cast(a.rong_carton as float),0)/25.4),1),'*',ROUND((ISNULL(Cast(a.cao_carton as float),0)/25.4),1)),' inch'),
iif(d.quycach1 = '','',CHAR(13) + d.quycach1)--)
as quycach_carton,
Concat(Cast(d.soluong_carton as nvarchar(50)) , ' piece') as soluong_carton,
iif(isnull(a.cbm,0) = 0,ROUND(a.cbm,2),ROUND((68.3/isnull(a.cbm,0)),2)) as soluong_sp_cont
from tr_sanpham a 
left join tr_loaisp b on a.loaisp = b.maloaisp
left join tr_sanpham_carton c on a.masp = c.masp
left join @table_carton_resul d on a.masp = d.masp
where a.masp = @masp
END


","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.cursorproduct","dbo.tr_loaisp","dbo.tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_sanpham_carton"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-cursor","has-while"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
